sourceTitle: Guidance for use of Generative AI tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Do not use generative AI for purposes that may require in-depth risk assessments without contacting ai-guidance@mit.edu. Examples include: recruitment and hiring of employees, evaluating student academic performance, making investment decisions, and complaint and dispute resolution.
evidenceLocator: Section: 'Consult with IS&T before purchasing or using generative AI tools'
